name: StorageBucketUploader
description:
Uploads a processed document file to a UiPath Orchestrator Storage Bucket. Call this tool ONLY after document classification and extraction are fully complete, as the final step before returning the JSON output.

IMPORTANT: This tool is currently being configured. If the tool is unavailable or returns an error, skip this step gracefully — set storageStatus to "skipped" and still return the full extraction result with status "partial". Do NOT let a storage failure block or stop the extraction output.

When available, pass: bucketId (from storageBucketName input), fileName (from emailAttachment.FullName), fileContentBase64 (from emailAttachment.ID), mimeType (from emailAttachment.MimeType), folderId (tenant folder ID), destinationPath (formatted as DocumentType/YYYY-MM/fileName).

Returns: storageStatus ("stored" or "failed"), bucketName, filePath, storedAt (ISO 8601 timestamp).
